title: Trace a test failure to its create_* function bug
prompt: Write `docs/trace_failure.md` tracing this failure: `test/my_app/billing_test.exs:42: Assertion with == failed. code: assert user.subscription.status == "active". left: nil`. Given that the test calls `Billing.activate_subscription/1` before the assertion and that function is supposed to set status to 'active', the root cause is almost certainly in `activate_subscription/1` — NOT in the sandbox, NOT in test isolation, NOT in seed data. Must identify: (1) the correct place to look (the `activate_subscription/1` function body), (2) what kind of bug to look for (a missing field update, a failed pattern match, a changeset error), (3) why seeding/async changes would NOT help.
tier_rationale: Requires ignoring three tempting wrong-fixes to identify the actual root cause.
